holdings.infoBox: PTL is an equity ETF with a total of 485 individual holdings. The top holdings are Broadcom stock at 11.15%, Exxon Mobil at 3.63%, Caterpillar at 2.24%, The Home Depot at 2.01%, and KLA Corporation at 1.67%.

overview.description: The Inspire 500 ETF (PTL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Inspire 500 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 500 large-cap US stocks, selected based on the issuers proprietary criteria of biblical values. PTL was launched on Mar 25, 2024 and is issued by Inspire.
